          <;>
          aesop
        simp_all [h₁]
        <;>
        positivity
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        -- Handle the case where the space is empty
        have h₁ : ‖(fun a : α => f a * g a)‖₊ = 0 := by
          simp [norm_eq_zero]
          <;>
          simp_all [Pi.zero_apply]
          <;>
          aesop
        simp_all [h₁]
        <;>
        positivity
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        -- General case for nonempty space with p = p'
        simp_all [LpNorm.norm, ENNReal.norm_eq_abs, norm_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg]
        <;>
        positivity
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        -- Use the fact that the product of the norms is greater than or equal to the norm of the product
        have h₁ : ‖(fun a : α => f a * g a)‖₊ = 0 := by
          simp [norm_eq_zero]
          <;>
          simp_all [Pi.zero_apply]
          <;>
          aesop
        simp_all [h₁]
        <;>
        positivity
      })

exact hr₀ h₆
    exfalso
    exact h₁
